summary: Phase 2 verification PASS. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases pass — exercises_count=102, every exercise has 'image' + 'images' (len=2), 10 random image URLs return HTTP 200, /api/exercises/groups returns 11 categories, /api/exercises/{id} detail OK, 404 for invalid id, CORS ok. Frontend (mobile 390x844): Schede header shows open-calculator-btn + open-presets-btn; calculator (100kg / 20kg bar) computes 40kg per side with greedy plates 25+15 (problem statement '1x20+1x15+...=40' example was illustrative — actual algorithm correctly picks 25+15 from kg set [25,20,15,10,5,2.5,1.25,0.5]); switching to 15kg bar recomputes to 42.5 per side; presets-screen shows ppl/full-body-3x/upper-lower, importing PPL creates 3 workouts and returns to Schede; opening a generated workout shows 6 pre-filled exercises and 5 toggle-superset buttons (one per exercise from idx 1+); tapping toggle yields SUPERSET label in edit screen and matching SUPERSET badge in active screen; in active workout, completing set on FIRST exercise of superset does NOT start rest, while completing set on LAST exercise of group starts 'PAUSA GIRO SUPERSET' timer (verified at 01:59 countdown). AnimatedExerciseImage component is correctly implemented (alternates frames every 700ms via setInterval, paused prop, expo-image). CSV export button is gated on hasCompleted history (correct UX) — when no completed sessions exist, button is hidden by design. No deprecated expo packages detected (expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch absent).
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' fired on app load — likely from a 3rd-party RN library (RNGH/Reanimated). Non-blocking but worth tracking; check whether react-native-gesture-handler/reanimated versions can be bumped to silence.

Plate calculator greedy algorithm correctly picks largest plate set 25+15=40 for default 100kg/20bar. The review request example (1x20+1x15+...) was illustrative; current behaviour is mathematically optimal.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_exercises_api.py (rewritten for Phase 2: 102 count, image+images len=2, image URL HEAD sampling, kept group/detail/CORS)
seed_data_creation: None (frontend storage is AsyncStorage on device; preset import creates 3 workouts in-session for testing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_exercises_api.py is the regression suite (11 cases, ~4s). Frontend Phase 2 verified end-to-end via playwright on mobile viewport 390x844 — flow: schede -> calculator (100kg/20bar -> 40 per side, 25+15 plates) -> back -> presets -> import-preset-ppl -> 3 workouts created -> open first workout -> 6 exercises pre-filled, toggle-superset on idx 1 -> SUPERSET badge -> start-workout-btn -> active screen shows SUPERSET badge -> completing set on idx 0 (first of superset) does NOT trigger rest -> completing set on idx 1 (last of superset) shows rest timer panel. CSV export button is hidden when no completed sessions exist (correct).
